requirement_topic.en: KEBS PVoC — Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (Mandatory Pre-Shipment Step)
requirement_topic.zh: KEBS PVoC — 出口前符合性验证（强制出货前步骤）
requirement_topic.zht: KEBS PVoC — 出口前符合性驗證（強制出貨前步驟）

summary.en: Kenya Bureau of Standards (KEBS) operates a mandatory Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme for regulated products destined for Kenya, including industrial motors in the KEBS mandatory product scope. Under PVoC, products must be inspected by a KEBS-accredited inspection body at the point of manufacture (in China for Chinese-origin motors) before shipment. The inspection verifies: (1) product conformity with applicable KS IEC standards; (2) safety and quality requirements; (3) documentation including test reports and manufacturing records. A Certificate of Conformity (CoC) is issued by the inspection body and must accompany each shipment. Without a valid CoC, goods may be detained, subjected to additional inspection, or refused entry at Kenya ports (Mombasa or Nairobi ICD). KEBS-accredited PVoC inspection bodies operating in China include Bureau Veritas, SGS, Intertek, and others on the KEBS-approved panel.
summary.zh: 肯尼亚标准局（KEBS）对进入肯尼亚的受管制产品（包括 KEBS 强制产品范围内的工业电机）实施强制出口前符合性验证（PVoC）计划。根据 PVoC，产品须在出货前由 KEBS 认可的检验机构在制造地（中国原产电机在中国）进行检验，核验内容包括：(1) 产品符合适用的 KS IEC 标准；(2) 安全和质量要求；(3) 包括测试报告和生产记录在内的文件。检验机构签发符合性证书（CoC），须随每批货物附带。无有效 CoC 的货物可能在肯尼亚港口（蒙巴萨或内罗毕内陆港）被扣押、接受额外检验或被拒绝入境。在中国开展业务的 KEBS 认可 PVoC 检验机构包括必维国际检验、SGS、天祥集团及 KEBS 认可名单上的其他机构。
summary.zht: 肯尼亞標準局（KEBS）對進入肯尼亞的受管制產品（包括 KEBS 強制產品範圍內的工業電機）實施強制出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）計劃。根據 PVoC，產品須在出貨前由 KEBS 認可的檢驗機構在製造地（中國原產電機在中國）進行檢驗，核驗內容包括：(1) 產品符合適用的 KS IEC 標準；(2) 安全和品質要求；(3) 包括測試報告和生產記錄在內的文件。檢驗機構簽發符合性證書（CoC），須隨每批貨物附帶。無有效 CoC 的貨物可能在肯尼亞港口（蒙巴薩或內羅畢內陸港）被扣押、接受額外檢驗或被拒絕入境。在中國開展業務的 KEBS 認可 PVoC 檢驗機構包括必維國際檢驗、SGS、天祥集團及 KEBS 認可名單上的其他機構。

standards_or_laws: Kenya Standards Act Cap 496 — KEBS mandatory product certification
KEBS PVoC Programme (Pre-Export Verification of Conformity)
KS IEC 60034-1, KS IEC 60034-30-1 (underlying motor standards)

summary.en: China has no outbound pre-shipment inspection programme equivalent to KEBS PVoC. Chinese export customs declaration (报关) requires documentation of export product specifications but does not conduct conformity-with-destination-country-standards inspections. The China Inspection and Quarantine (CIQ) system conducts inspection for certain regulated products at the port of export, but CIQ inspection does not satisfy KEBS PVoC requirements and does not issue a CoC recognised by KEBS. Chinese exporters must independently arrange KEBS-accredited PVoC inspection before shipment.
summary.zh: 中国没有与 KEBS PVoC 相当的出口前检验计划。中国出口海关申报要求提供出口产品规格文件，但不对目的国标准符合性进行检验。中国检验检疫（CIQ）系统对特定受管制产品在出口港进行检验，但 CIQ 检验不满足 KEBS PVoC 要求，也不签发 KEBS 认可的 CoC。中国出口商须在出货前独立安排 KEBS 认可的 PVoC 检验。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與 KEBS PVoC 相當的出口前檢驗計劃。中國出口海關申報要求提供出口產品規格文件，但不對目的國標準符合性進行檢驗。中國檢驗檢疫（CIQ）系統對特定受管制產品在出口港進行檢驗，但 CIQ 檢驗不滿足 KEBS PVoC 要求，也不簽發 KEBS 認可的 CoC。中國出口商須在出貨前獨立安排 KEBS 認可的 PVoC 檢驗。

standards_or_laws: China Customs (出入境检验检疫 — export declaration, not equivalent to PVoC)
No CN outbound equivalent to KEBS PVoC

gap.en: The PVoC gap is absolute and non-substitutable: no Chinese domestic certification, export inspection certificate, or customs declaration substitutes for a KEBS-issued PVoC Certificate of Conformity. The practical steps for Chinese motor exporters are: (1) identify and contract a KEBS PVoC-accredited inspection body operating in China (Bureau Veritas, SGS, Intertek are common options); (2) prepare all product documentation including test reports to KS IEC standards, manufacturing records, product samples; (3) schedule the factory inspection before production completion; (4) obtain the CoC; (5) include the CoC in the shipping documentation for each shipment. Lead time for PVoC inspection should be factored into production and export scheduling.
gap.zh: PVoC 差距是绝对的、不可替代的：任何中国国内认证、出口检验证书或海关申报文件均不能替代 KEBS 签发的 PVoC 符合性证书。中国电机出口商的实际操作步骤为：(1) 确定并签约在中国运营的 KEBS PVoC 认可检验机构（必维国际检验、SGS、天祥集团是常见选择）；(2) 准备所有产品文件，包括按 KS IEC 标准出具的测试报告、生产记录、产品样品；(3) 在生产完成前安排工厂检验；(4) 获取 CoC；(5) 将 CoC 纳入每批货物的装运文件。PVoC 检验所需时间应纳入生产和出口计划统筹考虑。
gap.zht: PVoC 差距是絕對的、不可替代的：任何中國國內認證、出口檢驗證書或海關申報文件均不能替代 KEBS 簽發的 PVoC 符合性證書。中國電機出口商的實際操作步驟為：(1) 確定並簽約在中國運營的 KEBS PVoC 認可檢驗機構（必維國際檢驗、SGS、天祥集團是常見選擇）；(2) 準備所有產品文件，包括按 KS IEC 標準出具的測試報告、生產記錄、產品樣品；(3) 在生產完成前安排工廠檢驗；(4) 獲取 CoC；(5) 將 CoC 納入每批貨物的裝運文件。PVoC 檢驗所需時間應納入生產和出口計劃統籌考慮。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — PVoC Certificate of Conformity required for each shipment of motors in KEBS mandatory scope; goods without valid CoC may be detained at Kenya port of entry
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — no Chinese outbound equivalent; CIQ export inspection does not substitute for KEBS PVoC

source.publisher: Kenya Bureau of Standards (KEBS) — PVoC Programme

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] KEBS PVoC is a pre-shipment mandatory requirement that must be arranged at the Chinese factory before each shipment. No Chinese domestic certification substitutes for a valid PVoC CoC. Exporters should contact a KEBS-accredited PVoC inspector early in the production cycle. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] KEBS PVoC 是出货前的强制要求，须在每次出货前在中国工厂安排完成。任何中国国内认证均不能替代有效的 PVoC CoC。出口商应在生产周期早期联系 KEBS 认可的 PVoC 检验机构。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] KEBS PVoC 是出貨前的強制要求，須在每次出貨前在中國工廠安排完成。任何中國國內認證均不能替代有效的 PVoC CoC。出口商應在生產週期早期聯繫 KEBS 認可的 PVoC 檢驗機構。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或監管建議。

requirement_topic.en: KRA Import Duties and Customs — Motor Tariff Classification
requirement_topic.zh: KRA 进口关税与海关 — 电机关税分类
requirement_topic.zht: KRA 進口關稅與海關 — 電機關稅分類

summary.en: The Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA) administers import duties and VAT on goods entering Kenya. Industrial AC motors are classified under HS Code Chapter 85 (Electrical machinery and equipment). The applicable import duty rate and any preferential rates (under COMESA, EAC, or other agreements) should be verified with KRA or a licensed customs agent before shipment. As Kenya is a member of the East African Community (EAC) and COMESA, preferential tariff rates may apply depending on origin. Goods from China (non-preferential origin) are subject to standard EAC Common External Tariff (CET) rates. Import VAT at 16% applies to most imported goods in Kenya. Accurate HS Code classification is required in the customs declaration; mis-classification can result in penalties.
summary.zh: 肯尼亚税务局（KRA）对进入肯尼亚的货物征收进口关税和增值税。工业交流电机在 HS 编码第 85 章（电气机械及设备）下分类。适用的进口关税税率及任何优惠税率（根据 COMESA、EAC 或其他协议）应在发货前向 KRA 或持牌报关行核实。由于肯尼亚是东非共同体（EAC）和 COMESA 成员，视原产地不同可能适用优惠关税税率。来自中国的货物（非优惠原产地）须适用标准 EAC 共同对外关税（CET）税率。大多数进口货物适用 16% 进口增值税。海关申报中须提供准确的 HS 编码分类；错误分类可能导致处罚。
summary.zht: 肯尼亞稅務局（KRA）對進入肯尼亞的貨物徵收進口關稅和增值稅。工業交流電機在 HS 編碼第 85 章（電氣機械及設備）下分類。適用的進口關稅稅率及任何優惠稅率（根據 COMESA、EAC 或其他協議）應在發貨前向 KRA 或持牌報關行核實。由於肯尼亞是東非共同體（EAC）和 COMESA 成員，視原產地不同可能適用優惠關稅稅率。來自中國的貨物（非優惠原產地）須適用標準 EAC 共同對外關稅（CET）稅率。大多數進口貨物適用 16% 進口增值稅。海關申報中須提供準確的 HS 編碼分類；錯誤分類可能導致處罰。

standards_or_laws: EAC Common External Tariff (CET) — applicable to non-preferential origin goods
KRA Customs and Border Control — HS Code classification

summary.en: China does not have export duties on industrial motors under current tariff schedules. Chinese exporters are responsible for accurate HS Code declaration on the China export customs form (报关单). The applicable HS Codes for motors in China follow the same international HS system; however, the specific sub-heading and duty treatment in Kenya may differ. Export VAT rebate may be available for motor exports under China's export tax rebate scheme; exporters should confirm the current rebate rate with their tax adviser.
summary.zh: 按现行关税表，中国对工业电机不征收出口关税。中国出口商须在报关单上准确申报 HS 编码。中国电机的适用 HS 编码遵循国际统一制度；但肯尼亚的具体子目和关税处理可能有所不同。根据中国出口退税政策，电机出口可能享有出口增值税退税；出口商应向税务顾问确认当前退税率。
summary.zht: 按現行關稅表，中國對工業電機不徵收出口關稅。中國出口商須在報關單上準確申報 HS 編碼。中國電機的適用 HS 編碼遵循國際統一制度；但肯尼亞的具體子目和關稅處理可能有所不同。根據中國出口退稅政策，電機出口可能享有出口增值稅退稅；出口商應向稅務顧問確認當前退稅率。

standards_or_laws: China Harmonized System (HS) — export customs classification
China Export Tax Rebate Scheme (出口退税) — verify current motor rebate rate

gap.en: The customs gap is primarily administrative: (1) Chinese motors exported to Kenya will attract EAC CET import duty at the non-preferential rate for Chapter 85 electrical machinery (verify current rate with KRA or licensed customs broker); (2) 16% Kenya import VAT applies in addition; (3) a KEBS PVoC CoC is required as a customs clearance document; (4) accurate HS Code classification must match the product description and any available KEBS certification. Failure to include the PVoC CoC in the shipping documentation can independently cause customs detention regardless of payment of duties.
gap.zh: 海关差距主要属于行政管理层面：(1) 出口至肯尼亚的中国电机将按第 85 章电气机械非优惠税率缴纳 EAC CET 进口关税（向 KRA 或持牌报关行核实当前税率）；(2) 另需缴纳 16% 肯尼亚进口增值税；(3) KEBS PVoC CoC 是清关所需文件；(4) 准确的 HS 编码分类须与产品描述及任何可用 KEBS 认证相符。未将 PVoC CoC 纳入装运文件可能独立导致海关扣押，与关税缴纳情况无关。
gap.zht: 海關差距主要屬於行政管理層面：(1) 出口至肯尼亞的中國電機將按第 85 章電氣機械非優惠稅率繳納 EAC CET 進口關稅（向 KRA 或持牌報關行核實當前稅率）；(2) 另需繳納 16% 肯尼亞進口增值稅；(3) KEBS PVoC CoC 是清關所需文件；(4) 準確的 HS 編碼分類須與產品描述及任何可用 KEBS 認證相符。未將 PVoC CoC 納入裝運文件可能獨立導致海關扣押，與關稅繳納情況無關。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — import duties and VAT are legal obligations; KEBS PVoC CoC is a mandatory customs clearance document; HS Code accuracy required by KRA
mandatory_status.cn: Standard export declaration required; no export duty on industrial motors under current CN schedule; VAT rebate may apply

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motor exporters to Kenya must budget for EAC CET import duty plus 16% Kenya VAT in addition to arranging KEBS PVoC. The PVoC CoC is required for customs clearance independently of duty payment. Engage a Kenya-licensed customs broker for accurate duty calculation and clearance. This is informational only and does not constitute legal, tax, or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电机向肯尼亚出口商除安排 KEBS PVoC 外，还须在预算中考虑 EAC CET 进口关税及 16% 肯尼亚增值税。PVoC CoC 是清关所需文件，与关税缴纳相互独立。建议委托肯尼亚持牌报关行进行准确的关税计算和清关。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律、税务或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電機向肯尼亞出口商除安排 KEBS PVoC 外，還須在預算中考慮 EAC CET 進口關稅及 16% 肯尼亞增值稅。PVoC CoC 是清關所需文件，與關稅繳納相互獨立。建議委託肯尼亞持牌報關行進行準確的關稅計算和清關。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律、稅務或監管建議。

requirement_topic.en: CCC Not Recognised — No Kenya-China Mutual Recognition Agreement
requirement_topic.zh: CCC 不被认可 — 肯尼亚与中国无相互认可协议
requirement_topic.zht: CCC 不被認可 — 肯尼亞與中國無相互認可協議

summary.en: Kenya has no bilateral mutual recognition agreement with China for electrical product certification. KEBS certification (Diamond Mark, PVoC CoC) is the mandatory Kenyan market access credential; Chinese CCC certification does not substitute for it. Kenyan market surveillance and KEBS field inspectors verify the presence of valid KEBS documentation; products bearing only CCC markings are not accepted as conforming products under the Kenya Standards Act. Importers and distributors in Kenya bear responsibility for ensuring that imported motors carry valid KEBS certification before placing them on the Kenyan market.
summary.zh: 肯尼亚与中国之间没有关于电气产品认证的双边相互认可协议。KEBS 认证（Diamond Mark、PVoC CoC）是进入肯尼亚市场的强制凭证；中国 CCC 认证不能替代 KEBS 认证。肯尼亚市场监管和 KEBS 实地检查人员核验有效 KEBS 文件；仅持有 CCC 标志的产品不被《肯尼亚标准法》认定为合格产品。肯尼亚进口商和分销商有责任确保进口电机在投放肯尼亚市场前持有有效 KEBS 认证。
summary.zht: 肯尼亞與中國之間沒有關於電氣產品認證的雙邊相互認可協議。KEBS 認證（Diamond Mark、PVoC CoC）是進入肯尼亞市場的強制憑證；中國 CCC 認證不能替代 KEBS 認證。肯尼亞市場監管和 KEBS 實地檢查人員核驗有效 KEBS 文件；僅持有 CCC 標誌的產品不被《肯尼亞標準法》認定為合格產品。肯尼亞進口商和分銷商有責任確保進口電機在投放肯尼亞市場前持有有效 KEBS 認證。

standards_or_laws: Kenya Standards Act Cap 496 — KEBS certification as market access requirement
KEBS Diamond Mark scheme — no recognition of CCC
No Kenya-China MRA for electrical product certification

summary.en: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is administered by CNCA and covers certain electrical products for the Chinese domestic market. For general industrial three-phase AC motors, CCC certification may or may not be required depending on the specific product and power rating (verify current CNCA catalogue). Where CCC applies, it demonstrates conformity with Chinese national standards for the domestic market only. CCC marks and certificates are not recognised by KEBS and have no market access value in Kenya.
summary.zh: CCC（中国强制认证）由 CNCA 管理，适用于中国国内市场的特定电气产品。对于通用三相交流工业电机，是否需要 CCC 认证取决于具体产品和功率等级（核实当前 CNCA 目录）。在适用 CCC 的情况下，其证明电机符合仅适用于国内市场的中国国家标准。CCC 标志和证书不被 KEBS 认可，在肯尼亚不具有市场准入价值。
summary.zht: CCC（中國強制認證）由 CNCA 管理，適用於中國國內市場的特定電氣產品。對於通用三相交流工業電機，是否需要 CCC 認證取決於具體產品和功率等級（核實當前 CNCA 目錄）。在適用 CCC 的情況下，其證明電機符合僅適用於國內市場的中國國家標準。CCC 標誌和證書不被 KEBS 認可，在肯尼亞不具有市場準入價值。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China domestic market certification only, not recognised in Kenya
CNCA (Certification and Accreditation Administration of China)

gap.en: The non-recognition of CCC in Kenya is a structural gap that requires Chinese exporters to obtain Kenya-specific KEBS certification for every motor shipment. There is no shortcut: KEBS PVoC inspection at origin is the only recognised pathway. Chinese manufacturers who have invested in CCC and GB certifications must additionally complete the KEBS PVoC process. Kenyan importers should not assume that CCC-marked motors are acceptable to KEBS inspectors and should contractually require their Chinese suppliers to provide valid PVoC CoC for every shipment.
gap.zh: 肯尼亚不认可 CCC 是一个结构性差距，要求中国出口商为每批电机货物获取肯尼亚特定的 KEBS 认证。没有捷径：在原产地进行 KEBS PVoC 检验是唯一被认可的途径。已投入获取 CCC 和 GB 认证的中国制造商还必须完成 KEBS PVoC 流程。肯尼亚进口商不应假设贴有 CCC 标志的电机可被 KEBS 检查人员接受，并应在合同中要求中国供应商为每批货物提供有效 PVoC CoC。
gap.zht: 肯尼亞不認可 CCC 是一個結構性差距，要求中國出口商為每批電機貨物獲取肯尼亞特定的 KEBS 認證。沒有捷徑：在原產地進行 KEBS PVoC 檢驗是唯一被認可的途徑。已投入獲取 CCC 和 GB 認證的中國製造商還必須完成 KEBS PVoC 流程。肯尼亞進口商不應假設貼有 CCC 標誌的電機可被 KEBS 檢查人員接受，並應在合同中要求中國供應商為每批貨物提供有效 PVoC CoC。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — KEBS certification is the only recognised market access credential in Kenya; CCC is explicitly not recognised
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic China market where CCC catalogue applies; irrelevant for Kenya market access

source.publisher: Kenya Bureau of Standards (KEBS) — Product Certification

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CCC certification provides no market access value in Kenya. Chinese motor manufacturers exporting to Kenya must obtain KEBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity for each shipment regardless of CCC status. Kenyan importers should include contractual requirements for KEBS PVoC compliance from their Chinese suppliers. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CCC 认证在肯尼亚不具有市场准入价值。出口至肯尼亚的中国电机制造商无论 CCC 状态如何，须为每批货物获取 KEBS PVoC 符合性证书。肯尼亚进口商应在合同中要求中国供应商满足 KEBS PVoC 合规要求。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CCC 認證在肯尼亞不具有市場準入價值。出口至肯尼亞的中國電機製造商無論 CCC 狀態如何，須為每批貨物獲取 KEBS PVoC 符合性證書。肯尼亞進口商應在合同中要求中國供應商滿足 KEBS PVoC 合規要求。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或監管建議。
